public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveApplicationRole(DirContext ctx, String applicationRole) throws NamingException { String query = "(|(appRole=" + applicationRole + ")(role=" + applicationRole + "))"; return ctx.search("dc=example,dc=com", query, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> searchPreferredName(DirContext ctx, String preferredName) throws NamingException { String filter = "(displayName=" + preferredName + ")"; return ctx.search("ou=profiles,dc=example,dc=com", filter, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> searchPreferredName(DirContext ctx, String preferredName) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("ou=profiles,dc=example,dc=com", "(displayName={0})", new Object[]{preferredName}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> searchPreferredName(DirContext ctx, String preferredName) throws NamingException { if (!preferredName.matches("[A-Za-z .'-]{1,80}")) throw new IllegalArgumentException(); return ctx.search("ou=profiles,dc=example,dc=com", "(displayName={0})", new Object[]{preferredName}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> searchPreferredName(DirContext ctx, String preferredName) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("ou=profiles,dc=example,dc=com", "(&(objectClass=person)(displayName={0}))", new Object[]{preferredName}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> searchPreferredName(DirContext ctx, String preferredName) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("dc=example,dc=com", "(displayName=" + preferredName + ")", new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> searchPreferredName(DirContext ctx, String preferredName) throws NamingException { String query = "(|(displayName=" + preferredName + ")(cn=" + preferredName + "))"; return ctx.search("dc=example,dc=com", query, new SearchControls()); }
